message:
test(ftui-core): expand glyph_policy.rs test coverage with edge-case and interaction tests (bd-pdk7d)

Add 27 new tests covering: detect_mode Vt100/LinuxConsole profiles, CJK-width disabling line-drawing/arrows, emoji edge cases, glyph_width CJK mode, env_override_bool exhaustive values, Copy trait, full policy snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
